pages.title: Secondary Classes
pages.text: Pick exactly one. Smaller catalogue than a primary, lighter per-item depth. You are still the only legal source — every secondary item is class-gated.$(br2)Each secondary maps to one trader. Other classes buy your work there for runes.

pages.title: Functional (harder recipes)
pages.text: $(li)$(l:secondaries/tinkerer)Tinkerer$(/l) — clockwork instruments and tech tools.$(li)$(l:secondaries/gunsmith)Gunsmith$(/l) — firearms, cartridges, the musket upgrade template.

pages.title: Class-gate only
pages.text: Mod-original recipes preserved; the class is the only delta.$(br)$(li)$(l:secondaries/fisher)Fisher$(/l) — fishing tackle (rods, lines, hooks, satchels, bobbers).$(li)$(l:secondaries/brewer)Brewer$(/l) — drinks, foods, brewing infrastructure.$(li)$(l:secondaries/bard)Bard$(/l) — instruments, books, music discs, chess.$(li)$(l:secondaries/decorator)Decorator$(/l) — wallpapers, skirting boards, themed banners.$(li)$(l:secondaries/tailor)Tailor$(/l) — hats, masks, plushies, cosmetic wearables.$(li)$(l:secondaries/herbalist)Herbalist$(/l) — hemp, burlap, smoking gear, herbal salves.
